snippet.title: Im Test haben wir Crimson Desert komplett falsch gespielt - Ihr müsst das zum Glück nicht!
snippet.description:
Alle Infos zu den neuen ECOVACS GOAT Geräten findet ihr unter https://www.amazon.de/stores/page/E51DE516-F6DE-475D-BEFB-F9A82506E582 (Werbung)

Das Open World Action Adventure Crimson Desert will alles machen! Spannende Bosskämpfe, riesige Schlachten, etliche Nebenquests, Drachen reiten, Mechs steuern, Angeln und und und. Aber kann das wirklich klappen? Immerhin ist das ein wirklich ambitioniertes Projekt. Noch dazu hat sich Crimson Desert während seiner Entwicklungszeit massiv verändert: Vom MMO zum Singleplayer.

Wir haben für den Test schon über 100 Stunden in die Welt von Crimson Desert gesteckt, um euch zu verraten, was das jetzt für ein Spiel geworden ist. Und vor allem: Ob es sich lohnt? So viel vorweg: Ihr solltet das Spiel anders spielen, als wir es getan haben. Mehr dazu im Video.

snippet.title: Eypio - Ömrüm
snippet.description:
Söz & Müzik : Eypio
Aranje : Tuğberk Işık & Burak Alkın
Yapım : Mahzen Media & Niffos Music @niffosmusictr
Yapımcı : Tolga Aykut
Mix - Mastering : Burak Alkın
Back Vocals : Duygu Kudu & Tuğberk Işık
Akustik Gitar : Yusuf Süner
Keyboard : Tuğberk Işık
Strings : Rhapsody Strings
Yapım Koordinatörü: Burak Berkin Çakır

‘’Ömrüm’’ sözleri ile:

Öyle bir ağırlık var benim hep üstümde 
Onlara ben küstüm de
Hatam var her özrümde
Günahım var da ben ondan korkmam

Tutmadım mı söyle ben seni el üstünde
Onlara bu suçlu de 
Yalanmış her sözünde
Haberim var da her bir durumdan

Ya vur beni ya da
Bu yükü al üstümden
Ateşim külüm de sen 
Dikensin gülüm desem
Gitmez ki burda her şey yolunda

Çözülür işler de basit bi kulum desen
Çektiğim her zulümde sen 
Bi kere gülümsesen
O zaman demek ki işler yolunda 

Çizerim üstünü sonra da hatırlamam
Demek ki geçmiş zaman
Haber yok yeraltından

Bu kurda ormanda inan ki her yer kapan
Çok gördüm yoldan sapan
Çıkış yok yeraltından

Ömrüm, ömrüm, ömrüm
Yalan dünyada neler gördüm
Ömrüm, ömrüm, ömrüm
Bu aşkta ben Veysel gibi kördüm

snippet.title: Dune: Part Three | Official Teaser Trailer
snippet.description:
Experience the epic conclusion. Dune: Part Three only in theaters December 18 #DuneMovie #FilmedforIMAX

Directed by Denis Villeneuve and written by Villeneuve and Brian K. Vaughan, Dune: Part Three is based on the novel Dune Messiah by Frank Herbert and delivers the epic conclusion to Villeneuve’s trilogy. The film stars Timothée Chalamet, Zendaya, Jason Momoa, Florence Pugh, Rebecca Ferguson, Isaach De Bankolé, with Charlotte Rampling, with Anya Taylor-Joy, and Robert Pattinson, and Javier Bardem, and features newcomers Nakoa-Wolf Momoa and Ida Brooke.

snippet.title: DUNE 3: Meine Gedanken zum Trailer!
snippet.description:
Hier geht's zum Podcast: https://open.spotify.com/episode/75VZpqObGGyOMRNdAbZcBg
Dune: Part Three ist ein angekündigter US-amerikanischer Science-Fiction-Film des kanadischen Filmemachers Denis Villeneuve, der am 18. Dezember 2026 in die US-amerikanischen Kinos kommen soll. Es handelt sich als Fortsetzung zu Dune (2021) und Dune: Part Two (2024) um eine Adaption von Frank Herberts 1969 veröffentlichtem Roman Der Herr des Wüstenplaneten. In der Hauptrolle verkörpert Timothée Chalamet abermals den nun zum Imperator aller Welten gekrönten Paul Muad’Dib, dessen Fremen-Armee einen blutigen Dschihad im Universum führt.

snippet.title: MEIN 80 STUNDEN Fazit zu Crimson Desert - Gameplay, Story und Open World Review
snippet.description:
Crimson Desert Tipps deutsch Ps5 Gameplay - Crimson Desert Review nach 80 Stunden, Gameplay Kampf, Rätsel, Story und Open World Fazit, Finaler Test zeigt grenzenlose Freiheit mit Kiritkpunkten

🎮 RPG Fans dürfen sich 2026 auf eine Menge Highlights freuen und für mich steht Crimson Desert dabei ganz weit oben. Extrem ambitioniert und voller krasser Gameplay Möglichkeiten sieht es fast zu gut aus, um wahr zu sein

Dickes Danke an alle Kanalmitglieder, die es mir ermöglichen auch weiterhin täglich Videos zu bringen. Besonderer Dank an die Kartoffel Ritter: Grey Shooter & Queenie
Sowie den Kartoffel Knappen: Annika und Dome :D

Wenn ihr auch Bock habt ein Teil der Kartoffel Armee zu werden lasst ein Abo da und aktiviert die Glocke um kein Video mehr zu verpassen

snippet.title: SPIDER-MAN: BRAND NEW DAY TRAILER REACTION!! Punisher | Scorpion | Marvel Studios
snippet.description:
ORGANIC WEBBING?! Greg Alba, Coy Jandreau, & John Humphrey react to the first official trailer for Spider-Man: Brand New Day starring Tom Holland as Peter Parker, with returning appearances from Zendaya as MJ, Jacob Batalon as Ned, Jon Bernthal as The Punisher, Mark Ruffalo as Bruce Banner, and Michael Mando as Scorpion. The trailer teases a darker, more emotional story for Peter after the events of No Way Home, while also hinting at a mysterious mutation storyline and a dangerous new wave of crime in New York.
This first look also has fans speculating hard about some possible new faces and identities, including Sadie Sink’s mysterious role, with many theories pointing toward Jean Grey, while Tramell Tillman is widely rumored to be connected to Damage Control. Viewers are also already buzzing over possible appearances from characters like Boomerang and Tarantula, on top of the more clearly revealed street-level chaos surrounding Spider-Man, Punisher, and Scorpion. At the time of writing, those rumored identities and character spots remain unconfirmed by official reporting, so we’re reacting to both what’s shown and what fans are piecing together.
With Destin Daniel Cretton directing, Spider-Man: Brand New Day is shaping up to be one of the most talked-about Marvel movies of 2026.

localized.description:
Save the Heart of the City and claim the Tablet of Life and Time. ⏳

As New York descends into chaos, a powerful artifact emerges at the center of it all. Coveted by kings, thieves, and forces moving in the shadows, the Tablet of Life and Time has become the key to reshaping fate itself. From Fisk's desperate plans to Black Cat's dangerous heist, every move in Season 7 draws the city deeper into a conflict where time, power, and freedom hang in the balance.

Unlock 10 new costumes and exclusive cosmetics in the Season 7 Battle Pass: The Tablet of Life and Time, and remember - once purchased, it can be permanently unlocked and completed at your own pace.

📅 Season 7 begins on March 20 UTC!
